raw_response: Given your audiophile leanings and preference for high-quality sound, the Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless headphones are an excellent choice. With a remarkable 60-hour battery life and top-tier audio codecs like aptX Adaptive, these over-ear headphones deliver exceptional sound quality. While touch controls may have a slight learning curve, their strong noise cancellation and comfortable design make them ideal for home use. Plus, your familiarity with Sennheiser enhances the appeal of this premium product.
